title: Hand Function
parameters: point	Optional.  Point expression.  If point is omitted, then the hand (arm) orientation of the current robot position is returned.
description:
Hand Function

Hand Function

See_Also  Example

Returns the hand (arm) orientation of a point.
see_also:
Elbow, Wrist, J4Flag, J6Flag, J1Flag, J2Flag

Hand Function Example

Print Hand(pick)

Print Hand(P1)

Print Hand

Print Hand(P1 + P2)
examples:
Print Hand(pick)
Print Hand(P1)
Print Hand
Print Hand(P1 + P2)
